⚔ LEGEND OF ZELDA ⚔

— ULTIMATE EDITION —

WASD / Arrows · Move

Z / Space · Sword    X · Bomb    C · Sub-Item (boomerang/bow)

Enter · Enter Dungeon / Open Chest / Unlock Door

Collect 3 Triforce Shards from 3 Dungeons to rescue Zelda

— Press Any Key to Begin —
MINIMAP
HEARTS ♥♥♥
RUPEES 0
KEYS 0
BOMBS 3
ITEM —
TRI 0/3
Find the dungeons, collect the Triforce fragments, and save Zelda.
